title: goodenia glandulosa
intro: Goodenia glandulosa, also known as Goodenia or Finger Root, is a type of flowering plant native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Goodenia glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Goodenia glandulosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
